title: qRTP
description: A simple and lightweight /rtp plugin that covers your needs!
body:
## qRTP

qRTP is a lightweight and reliable random teleport plugin for Minecraft servers.

It is built for server owners who want a clean RTP plugin that feels safe, predictable, and configurable — without unnecessary bloat.

### Features

- Random teleport with `/rtp`
- Biome-targeted RTP with `/rtp biome <biome>`
- World-targeted RTP support
- Safe landing validation
- Configurable search radius and center
- Countdown and cooldown support
- PlaceholderAPI support
- Custom chat messages, titles, subtitles, and actionbars
- Per-world configuration support
- Lightweight and focused design

### Safe and predictable RTP

qRTP is designed to avoid bad teleport destinations.

It validates the landing spot carefully and rejects unsafe locations such as water-based landings, dangerous blocks, invalid support blocks, and other unreliable positions.  
Before the player is actually teleported, the final destination is validated again.

### Biome-targeted RTP

Need biome RTP? qRTP supports targeted biome teleports while still keeping safety checks in place.

If a biome matches but the landing spot is unsafe, qRTP continues searching instead of failing immediately.  
Even ocean biomes can be targeted intentionally — but qRTP will only teleport the player if a real safe land location is found.

### Configurable search behavior

qRTP gives you control over how RTP behaves on your server.

You can configure things like:
- search radius
- center mode
- generated-chunk-only behavior
- safety filters
- cooldowns and countdowns
- per-world behavior
- messages and formatting

### Admin-friendly

qRTP includes quality-of-life features for real server use:
- reload command
- config validation
- schema-based config migration
- automatic backups before config rewrites
- update notices for new releases

### Why qRTP?

qRTP focuses on the things that actually matter:
- safe teleports
- predictable behavior
- lightweight design
- clean configuration
- good server-owner experience

If you want a random teleport plugin that feels polished without turning into a giant all-in-one system, qRTP is made for exactly that.
